title: hieracium littuanicum
intro: Hieracium littuanicum, also known as hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter taste. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium littuanicum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts can be used to make infusions, teas, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
